name: Door Systems
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. ~$36.3B global industrial door systems (2025). ZOLLERN wins 9/22 needs overall but against volume-viable incumbents only (roll forming, hot-rolled), net weighted delta is +83. Key differentiators: surface hardness for cycle life (N04), fire door seal groove precision (N19), EN 10204 3.1 material certificates (N21).
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Target fire-rated and high-cycle industrial door OEMs where hardness and seal groove precision justify premium.
